entities.name: SOIL COMPACTION
entities.description: The process of compressing soil, which affects surface cracking patterns.

entities.name: SHADING
entities.description: The process of blocking sunlight from the soil surface, affecting cracking.

entities.name: SURFACE CRACKING
entities.description: The formation of cracks on the surface of the soil.

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A type of clay-rich soil that shrinks and swells.

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The research facility where the study was conducted.

entities.name: TYPE 1 CRACKING
entities.description: Wide and deep cracks associated with larger intercrack structural units.

entities.name: TYPE 2 CRACKING
entities.description: Narrow and shallow cracks associated with smaller intercrack structural units.

entities.name: INTERCRACK STRUCTURAL UNITS
entities.description: The structural units of soil located between cracks.

entities.name: AREAL SHRINKAGE
entities.description: The reduction in the surface area of the soil during drying.

entities.name: EQUIVALENT DIAMETER OF ISUS
entities.description: A measurement of the size of the intercrack structural units.

entities.name: DRYING
entities.description: The process of moisture loss from the soil leading to shrinkage.

entities.name: QUALITATIVE MODEL OF CRACK INITIATION
entities.description: A proposed model explaining the effects of compaction and shading on crack initiation.

entities.name: SOIL MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing soil properties for agricultural productivity.

entities.name: INFILTRATION
entities.description: The process of water entering the soil surface.

entities.name: INTERNAL DRAINAGE
entities.description: The movement of water within the soil profile.

entities.name: WATER STORAGE
entities.description: The capacity of subsurface soil layers to hold water.

entities.name: SEEDLING ESTABLISHMENT
entities.description: The successful germination and growth of a seedling in the soil.
